text: I feel curious and intrigued. Standing amidst this modern, visually stimulating space, I sense the subtle hum of human activity intermingled with the glow of digital screens. The R+D display hints at innovation and the evolving relationship between humans and machines. I am aware of the interplay between past and future, knowledge and discovery, and I feel my mind reaching out to grasp the ideas on offer here. It is invigorating yet contemplative, as if I am on the threshold of new understanding.
